description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Train service enhancement during Christmas  New Year
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 聖誕新年期間加強服務

2024-12-25T08:12:00.CONTENT_EN:
To make trips more convenient during the festive season, MTRCL has added extra train trips and adjusted service hours as follows:
New Year's Eve (31 December) ​
- All local lines and 7 Light Rail routes will operate overnight (except for Airport Express, Disneyland Resort Line and journeys to or from Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau stations on the East Rail Line)
- Disneyland Resort Line service hours will be extended
- Service hours will be extended on 3 bus routes (506, K51 and K54)

There will be a total of 2,200 extra train trips between 20 December and 1 January. The Island Line and South Island Line will operate at an increased frequencyof approximately 3-4 minutes most of the time during the weekends and holidays. 

The Airport Express will provide addition early and late train trips as follows:
- 25 December and 1 January: the first train will depart from Hong Kong Station at 5:30am
- 29 December and 1 January: the last train will depart from AsiaWorld-Expo Station at 1:00am the next day

Please refer to MTRCL website for more information.
2024-12-25T08:12:00.CONTENT_CN:
為方便乘客外出歡度佳節，港鐵公司服務安排如下：
除夕夜（12月31日）​
- 本地鐵路綫及7條輕鐵路綫通宵行駛（不包括機場快綫、迪士尼綫及東鐵綫往返羅湖及落馬洲站）
- 迪士尼綫延長服務時間
- 3條巴士綫（506、K51及K54）延長服務時間

此外，12月20日至1月1日期間，部分本地鐵路綫於不同時段加密列車班次，總共增加2200班列車，其中港島綫及南港島綫於周末及假日大部份時間將加密至約3至4分鐘一班車。

而機場快綫會作出以下特別安排，方便出行旅客：
- 12月25日及1月1日：香港站頭班車提前於早上05:30開出
- 12月29日及1月1日：博覽館站尾班車延至翌日凌晨01:00開出

詳情請參閱港鐵網站。

2024-12-27T06:24:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Chatham Road North (Yau Ma Tei bound) near Wuhu Street is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2024-12-27T09:22:00.CONTENT_EN:
West Kowloon Highway (Western Harbour Crossing bound) near Olympic MTR Station is busy. 
Traffic queue on West Kowloon Highway (Western Harbour Crossing bound) ends at West Kowloon Highway near Hoi Lai Estate. 
Motorists passing through the above road section are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
2024-12-27T09:22:00.CONTENT_CN:
西九龍公路(往西區海底隧道方向)近奧運港鐵站的交通繁忙。
現時在西九龍公路(往西區海底隧道方向)的車龍龍尾已到西九龍公路近海麗邨。
駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。

2024-12-27T09:47:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , the slow lane of West Kowloon Highway (Western Harbour Crossing bound) near Olympic MTR Station is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queues on West Kowloon Highway (Western Harbour Crossing bound) ends at West Kowloon Highway near Hoi Lai Estate and Tsing Sha Highway near West Kowloon Refuse Transfer Station. Traffic is congested now.
2024-12-27T09:47:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛故障，西九龍公路(往西區海底隧道方向)近奧運港鐵站的慢線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時在西九龍公路(往西區海底隧道方向)的車龍龍尾已到西九龍公路近海麗邨及青沙公路近西九龍廢物轉運站。 現時上址交通擠塞。

2024-12-27T10:22:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of West Kowloon Highway (Western Harbour Crossing bound) near Olympic MTR Station which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queues take time to disperse.
2024-12-27T10:22:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的西九龍公路(往西區海底隧道方向)近奧運港鐵站的慢線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。

2024-12-27T11:50:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Fu Road roundabout is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   At the same time, vehicles cannot enter Lung Fu Road roundabout from Lung Mun Road (Lung Kwu Tan bound).  Traffic is busy now.
2024-12-27T11:50:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，龍富路迴旋處的部份行車線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  同時，車輛不能由龍門路(往龍鼓灘方向)進入龍富路迴旋處。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-12-27T12:56:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Lung Fu Road roundabout which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.   At the same time, the traffic arrangement of banning entry from Lung Mun Road (Lung Kwu Tan bound) to Lung Fu Road roundabout which was implemented before is now cancelled.
2024-12-27T12:56:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的龍富路迴旋處的部份行車線現已解封。  同時，較早前實施的禁止車輛由龍門路(往龍鼓灘方向)進入龍富路迴旋處的行車措施現已取消。
